---
title: Integration Techniques
description: Substitution, parts, and numeric approximation.
---

::: {.learning-objectives}
### Learning Objectives

- Recognize when substitution can simplify an integral.
- Recognize when integration by parts is useful.
- Approximate integrals numerically.
:::

## Numeric Approximation

When symbolic integration is hard, approximate the area.

```{python}
from edumath.calculus.integrals import midpoint_riemann_sum

midpoint_riemann_sum("x**2", 0, 1, 100)
```

## Practice

::: {.practice-box}
1. Which technique fits `integral 2x*cos(x^2) dx`?
2. Which technique fits `integral x*exp(x) dx`?
3. Approximate `integral x^2 dx` from `0` to `1`.
:::
